subject: {rival} inquires about {player}
body:
{rival} has made informal inquiries about {player}'s availability. They seem keen on strengthening their roster and see {player} as a target.

No formal offer yet, but I wanted to keep you informed.

es.subject: {rival} pregunta por {player}
es.body:
{rival} ha hecho consultas informales sobre la disponibilidad de {player}. Parecen estar interesados en reforzar su plantilla y ven a {player} como objetivo.

Aún no hay oferta formal, pero quería mantenerle informado.
